display_information.name: Agent Orange
display_information.description: Ask questions about Northstar customers: tickets, calls, internal docs, competitor research.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Research assistant over Northstar customer artifacts.

suggested_prompts.title: BlueHarbor proof plan
suggested_prompts.message: Which customer's issue started after the 2026-02-20 taxonomy rollout, and what proof plan did we propose to get them comfortable with renewal?

suggested_prompts.title: Verdant Bay rollback
suggested_prompts.message: For Verdant Bay, what's the approved live patch window, and exactly how do we roll back if the validation checks fail?

suggested_prompts.title: NA West cohort
suggested_prompts.message: Among the North America West Event Nexus accounts, which ones are really dealing with taxonomy/search semantics problems versus duplicate-action problems?

suggested_prompts.title: Canada bypass pattern
suggested_prompts.message: Do we have a recurring Canada approval-bypass pattern across accounts, or is MapleBridge basically a one-off?
